opinion.h4: SMITH v. WARDEN, CONNECTICUT STATE PRISON. APPEAL FROM THE SUPERIOR COURT OF CONNECTICUT, HARTFORD COUNTY. No. 934, Misc. Decided June 1, 1965.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
WARD v. NEW YORK. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 1158, Misc. Decided June 1, 1965.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
